title: As campaign reaches a crescendo, Modi reaches out to Matuas, Mamata camps at Bhabanipur
description: PM Modi tells Matua community not to fall for the ‘Trinamool’s lies on CAA’ and promises that ‘all refugees will receive permanent address in this country’; CM Mamata says her party has ‘scored a century in the first round’ of polls and that the ‘BJP is scared’
